name: tools-manager
description: A Bun CLI for managing AI agent skills and MCP server configuration across tools.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun run typecheck && bun build --target=bun --outfile=dist/cli.js ./src/cli.ts
scripts.release:patch: bun run check && npm version patch && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: bun run check && npm version minor && npm publish
scripts.release:major: bun run check && npm version major && npm publish
